violations.text: Several products packaged in the food establishment are lacking adequate labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/03/2024
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quaternary ammonium sanitizing solution for the three bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 12/03/2024
The door to the restroom is not self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 12/10/2024
The floor in the front service/prep area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/28/2025

Food packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. New Violation. Correct By: 12/20/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of bio-film. Ice machine to be washed, rinsed, and sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 12/20/2023
